articles.title: How ChatGPT adoption broadened in early 2026
articles.summary: ChatGPT adoption surged in Q1 2026, with fastest growth among users over 35 and more balanced gender usage, signaling broader mainstream AI adoption.

articles.title: Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber
